_readme: Sponsors and sponsorship packages shown on the Support page. Add a sponsor by dropping a logo in public/brand/sponsors/ and adding an entry to `sponsors`. Packages come straight from the team's sponsorship graphic.
bannerDeadline: Businesses interested in the home-game banner must inquire by January 15, 2027.

packages.name: Bronze
perks: Featured in one social media post across all platforms

packages.name: Silver
perks: Featured in one social media post across all platforms
Logo on the official sponsorship banner at all home games

packages.name: Gold
perks: Featured in one social media post across all platforms
Logo on the official sponsorship banner at all home games
Personalized shoutout reel featuring two or more players

packages.name: Top Sponsor
perks: Featured in one social media post across all platforms
Additional personalized reel featuring two or more players
Logo on the official sponsorship banner at all home games
Logo + tagged account on every gameday graphic
